description: Your organization's SIEM has captured unusual authentication patterns in the last few hours. As the on-call security analyst, investigate the log data in ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer to identify the user account targeted in a brute-force attack and the primary source IP address. Create a threshold-based alert profile in EventLog Analyzer for the discovered account with a Critical severity that triggers on 5 or more failed authentication events within 5 minutes. Document your findings, including the targeted username, attacker source IP, total failed attempts observed, and recommended remediation steps, in a report at ~/Desktop/incident_report.txt. Log in with username: admin, password: admin.
